name: 商品与服务
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 经济活动 / Economic Systems / Economic Systems
curriculum_points: Students will be able to distinguish between goods (products) and services (actions) and identify examples of each within their local community. (Age 5-7)
Students will be able to map the journey of a good or service from production to consumer, identifying the roles of different community members. (Age 7-9)
